label: Historical Societies Explorer Game Pack

societies.label: Ancient Egypt
societies.summary: Monumental state formation, ritual continuity, engineering skill, stratified hierarchy, and long-duration cultural memory.

societies.label: Classical Athens
societies.summary: Political experimentation, philosophy, arts, warfare, exclusion, and dependence on unequal social structures.

societies.label: Han China
societies.summary: Administrative continuity, infrastructure, scholarship, frontier expansion, taxation, and labor burden.

societies.label: Medieval Mali
societies.summary: Trade, scholarship, imperial power, wealth concentration, and regional cultural influence.

action_cards.long_term_effect: social burden and unequal power distribution

action_cards.title: Political experimentation and civic participation
action_cards.short_term_effect: participatory decision structures for a portion of the population

action_cards.long_term_effect: deep moral contradiction inside celebrated institutions

action_cards.title: Administrative and infrastructural consolidation
action_cards.long_term_effect: long-range continuity in governance and exchange

review_prompts: What is well supported by evidence?
What is a plausible interpretation rather than a fact?
What action produced harm or exclusion?
What tradeoff or contradiction is visible?
What public summary can be stated without flattening complexity?
